Mr. and Mrs. Smith (2005)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $186,336,279Details
International Box Office $299,787,811
Worldwide Box Office $486,124,090
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$50,342,878 (27.0% of total gross)
Legs:3.70 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:38.3% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$110,000,000 (worldwide box office is 4.4 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,424 opening theaters/3,451 max. theaters, 7.4 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $347,672,679

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: June 10th, 2005 (Wide) by 20th Century Fox, released as Mr. And Mrs. Smith
International Releases: June 10th, 2005 (Wide), released as Mr And Mrs Smith (Australia)
Video Release: November 29th, 2005 by Fox Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for sequences of violence, intense action, sexual content and brief strong language.
Running Time: 120 minutes
Plot point: Assassination, Car Chase, Family Secrets, Hitmen, Secret Agent, Secret Identity
Social setting: Nightclub
Subgenre: Action Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Regency Enterprises, New Regency, Summit Entertainment, Weed Road Pictures
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
